ddls:
CREATE TABLE "repositories" (
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repository */,
  "repo_name" TEXT /* Name of the repository */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the repository */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the repository was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the repository was last updated */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner of the repository */,
  "default_branch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the default branch */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility of the repository (public, private) */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the repository is archived */,
  "stars" INTEGER /* Number of stars the repository has received */,
  "forks" INTEGER /* Number of forks of the repository */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("repo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repositories_default_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("default_branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repositories_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, manager, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (active, suspended, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commits" (
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commit */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository where the commit was made */,
  "commit_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the commit */,
  "commit_message" TEXT /* Message of the commit */,
  "commit_date" TEXT /* Date the commit was made */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author of the commit */,
  "parent_commit_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the parent commit */,
  "merge_commit" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the commit is a merge commit */,
  "commit_type" TEXT /* Type of commit (e.g., feature, bug fix, documentation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commits_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commits_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository where the file is located */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the file */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the file in bytes */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., Java, Python, C++) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the file was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the file was last updated */,
  "last_commit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the last commit that modified the file */,
  "is_binary" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the file is binary */,
  "is_test_file" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the file is a test file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_files_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "code_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each code metric */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file the metric belongs to */,
  "nb_classes" INTEGER /* Number of classes in the file */,
  "nb_methods" INTEGER /* Number of methods in the file */,
  "nb_lines" INTEGER /* Number of lines of code in the file */,
  "nb_comments" INTEGER /* Number of comments in the file */,
  "nb_bugs" INTEGER /* Number of bugs in the file */,
  "nb_code_smells" INTEGER /* Number of code smells in the file */,
  "nb_security_vulnerabilities" INTEGER /* Number of security vulnerabilities in the file */,
  "nb_functions" INTEGER /* Number of functions in the file */,
  "nb_interfaces" INTEGER /* Number of interfaces in the file */,
  "nb_enums" INTEGER /* Number of enums in the file */,
  "nb_comments_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the file that is comments */,
  "cyclomatic_complexity" INTEGER /* Cyclomatic complexity of the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_metrics_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commit_files" (
  "commit_file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commit-file relationship */,
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commit */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., added, modified, deleted) */,
  "lines_added" INTEGER /* Number of lines added in the commit */,
  "lines_removed" INTEGER /* Number of lines removed in the commit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commit_file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commit_files_commit_id FOREIGN KEY ("commit_id") REFERENCES commits ("commit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commit_files_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., commit, pull request, merge) */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "branches" (
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each branch */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository where the branch is located */,
  "branch_name" TEXT /* Name of the branch */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the branch was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the branch was last updated */,
  "is_protected" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the branch is protected */,
  "merge_strategy" TEXT /* Merge strategy used for the branch (e.g., merge, rebase) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("branch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_branches_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commit_branches" (
  "commit_branch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commit-branch relationship */,
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commit */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the branch */,
  "merge_commit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the merge commit if the branch is merged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commit_branch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commit_branches_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commit_branches_commit_id FOREIGN KEY ("commit_id") REFERENCES commits ("commit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pull_requests" (
  "pr_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pull request */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository where the pull request was made */,
  "pr_title" TEXT /* Title of the pull request */,
  "pr_description" TEXT /* Description of the pull request */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the pull request was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the pull request was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the pull request (e.g., open, closed, merged) */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author of the pull request */,
  "merged_by_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who merged the pull request */,
  "base_branch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the base branch for the pull request */,
  "head_branch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the head branch for the pull request */,
  "reviewers" TEXT /* List of reviewer IDs */,
  "labels" TEXT /* List of labels associated with the pull request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pr_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_requests_head_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("head_branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_requests_merged_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("merged_by_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_requests_base_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("base_branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_requests_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pull_requests_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pr_files" (
  "pr_file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pull request-file relationship */,
  "pr_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pull request */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., added, modified, deleted) */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Status of the file review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pr_file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pr_files_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pr_files_pr_id FOREIGN KEY ("pr_id") REFERENCES pull_requests ("pr_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pr_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pull request review */,
  "pr_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pull request */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the review */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., approved, rejected, pending) */,
  "review_comments" TEXT /* Comments made during the review */,
  "review_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pr_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pr_reviews_pr_id FOREIGN KEY ("pr_id") REFERENCES pull_requests ("pr_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "builds" (
  "build_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each build */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository where the build was made */,
  "build_number" INTEGER /* Number of the build */,
  "build_status" TEXT /* Status of the build (e.g., success, failure, in progress) */,
  "build_date" TEXT /* Date the build was made */,
  "build_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the build in seconds */,
  "trigger_type" TEXT /* Type of trigger for the build */,
  "triggered_by_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who triggered the build */,
  "build_log" TEXT /* Log of the build process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("build_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_builds_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_builds_triggered_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("triggered_by_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "build_files" (
  "build_file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each build-file relationship */,
  "build_id" INTEGER /* ID of the build */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file */,
  "file_status" TEXT /* Status of the file in the build (e.g., built, failed) */,
  "build_output" TEXT /* Output of the build for the file */,
  "build_errors" TEXT /* Errors encountered during the build for the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("build_file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_build_files_build_id FOREIGN KEY ("build_id") REFERENCES builds ("build_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_build_files_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deployments" (
  "deployment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deployment */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository where the deployment was made */,
  "build_id" INTEGER /* ID of the build that was deployed */,
  "deployment_status" TEXT /* Status of the deployment (e.g., success, failure, in progress) */,
  "deployment_date" TEXT /* Date the deployment was made */,
  "deployment_environment" TEXT /* Environment where the deployment was made (e.g., staging, production) */,
  "deployed_by_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who deployed the build */,
  "deployment_log" TEXT /* Log of the deployment process */,
  "rollback_status" TEXT /* Status of the rollback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deployment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deployments_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deployments_deployed_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("deployed_by_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deployments_build_id FOREIGN KEY ("build_id") REFERENCES builds ("build_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the repository or file */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository being accessed */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the repository or file was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the repository or file */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user accessing the repository or file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)
